title: Handle stopped canister state gracefully and add canister health check

requirements.text: Add a canister health/status check in the backend that can be called even when the bot is in a stopped or idle state, so the frontend can determine canister availability before attempting state-changing calls like startBot.
acceptanceCriteria: A lightweight query method (e.g., ping or getStatus) exists on the backend actor that returns without error regardless of bot running state.
The method does not require the bot to be running to respond successfully.

requirements.text: In the BotControlPanel and the useQueries hooks, wrap the startBot mutation call with error handling that detects IC0508 (canister stopped / reject code 5) and surfaces a clear, human-readable error message to the user instead of a raw rejection dump.

quotes: Reject text: Canister erwl3-piaaa-aaaau-ae5la-cai is stopped

acceptanceCriteria: When startBot is called and the canister returns IC0508 / reject code 5, the UI displays a user-friendly error message such as 'The canister is currently stopped. Please wait and try again.'
The raw rejection JSON is not shown to the user.
The Start button returns to its default (non-loading) state after the error is caught.

requirements.text: Add a canister availability pre-check in the startBot and stopBot mutation flows: before invoking the mutation, call the lightweight query method (ping/getStatus) and if it fails or indicates the canister is unavailable, abort with a friendly error rather than letting the update call fail with a raw IC error.
acceptanceCriteria: If the pre-check query fails before startBot/stopBot, the user sees a clear message that the canister is not reachable.
The mutation is not dispatched to the canister if the pre-check indicates unavailability.
Normal start/stop flow is unaffected when the canister is running.

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend logic must remain in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture).
nonGoals: Automatically restarting or upgrading the canister from within the app.
Changes to the core grid trading logic or order placement mechanics.
